items.name: tokens
items.title: Design Tokens
items.description: All --ln-* design tokens, v2 Liquid Optics: light default + dark theme, type, spacing, radius, motion.

items.name: glass-switch
items.title: Glass Switch
items.description: An accessible switch with a refracting glass handle that slides between off and on.

items.name: glass-slider
items.title: Glass Slider
items.description: A range slider with a refracting glass handle. Drag, or use arrow keys.

items.name: glass-segmented-control
items.title: Glass Segmented Control
items.description: A segmented control whose refracting glass lens slides between options. One filter, no map regen on selection change.

items.name: glass-tabs
items.title: Glass Tabs
items.description: Tabs with a refracting glass lens that slides between labels. WAI-ARIA tablist pattern, animated lens, no map regen.

items.name: glass-button
items.title: Button
items.description: Matte button primitive. Variants: primary, secondary, ghost, danger. Sizes: sm/md/lg. Focus ring, disabled state.

items.name: glass-badge
items.title: Badge
items.description: Matte pill badge. Tones: accent, success, warning, danger, info, neutral. 14% tint background, semantic text color.

items.name: glass-card
items.title: Card / StatCard
items.description: Matte surface card (Card, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardContent) and KPI StatCard with optional delta indicator.

items.name: glass-checkbox
items.title: Checkbox
items.description: Matte 20×20 checkbox. Controlled/uncontrolled, mixed state, Space toggles, accent fill with checkmark.

items.name: glass-field
items.title: Field / Label
items.description: Matte form field wrapper (Field) with caption-style Label and optional error line. Wires htmlFor/id and aria-describedby via useId.

items.name: glass-input
items.title: Input / Textarea
items.description: Matte text input and textarea. Surface-2 background, border-strong border, sm/md/lg sizes, invalid state, focus ring.

items.name: glass-native-select
items.title: NativeSelect
items.description: Matte native <select> with a custom inline-SVG chevron. sm/md/lg sizes, invalid state, options prop or children.
